MINI MINUTES:
This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Ron Sinclair. Steven A. Boossska, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Conde Nast Publications. The Court receives evidence and grants judgment as follows: Principal: $62,864.00; Attorney Fees: $660.00; Interest: $13,259.40; Costs: $281.00 for a total judgment of $77,064.40. Judgment signed in open court.
